findings.location: s1 — NAFのアプリケーション動作モデル
findings.description: The knowledge file covers what constitutes a request and its minimum unit per processing type, but omits what is returned as a result: for 画面オンライン処理 the HTTPレスポンス is returned, and for バッチ処理 the 処理結果ステータス is returned. This is explicit in the source and relevant to understanding the full request/response model.
findings.source_evidence: 「画面オンライン処理であれば、HTTPレスポンスの内容が返され、バッチ処理では入力レコードに対する処理結果ステータスが返される。」

findings.description: PascalCase class names MultiThreadExecutionHandler and RequestPathJavaPackageMapping appear in s3's XML code block but are absent from s3's hints array. Per V4, hints should include class names from the section's own content.
